content: LinkedIn remains the highest CPL channel, but provides the highest Lead-to-SQL conversion rate for the AnimaOS target profile.
Current lead scoring is over-weighting whitepaper downloads, which is flooding the pipeline with low-intent researchers.
Architected a multi-channel nurture sequence that increased the MQL-to-SQL velocity by 18% over the last quarter.
The current CRM is leaking leads at the 'Hand-off to Sales' stage due to a lack of standardized qualification data.
